commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared SSH/OpenShell exec-command preflight in `buildExecRemoteCommand`, moves command construction before SSH/OpenShell session setup, updates focused tests, and refreshes the Plugin SDK API baseline hash.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main passes `params.command` into the shared SSH `/bin/sh -c` builder without validation, and OpenShell builds that command only after sandbox/session setup; I did not run a live OpenShell session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The next action is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus maintainer compatibility review; automation cannot provide the contributor's real-environment evidence.

target.title: fix: preflight malformed OpenShell exec commands
target.body:
Fixes #72373.

## Summary
- Add a shared SSH exec command preflight before remote `/bin/sh -c` execution.
- Reject unresolved generated placeholders like `<workflow-id>` and common malformed shell input such as unclosed quotes, trailing escapes, unterminated command substitutions, and unterminated here-docs.
- Preserve legitimate shell syntax including redirection, compact redirection, here-doc bodies, process substitution, arithmetic expansion, quoted placeholder-looking text, and comments.
- Build remote exec commands before opening SSH/OpenShell sessions so malformed input fails before session setup.

This follows ClawSweeper's suggested fix shape: keep the existing loop-detection behavior and add the remaining focused validator at the shared SSH/OpenShell exec boundary.

## Proof
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/sandbox/ssh.test.ts extensions/openshell/src/openshell-core.test.ts -t "rejects malformed generated exec commands|allows shell features and quoted placeholder-looking text|uses the shared SSH exec command preflight|rejects malformed exec commands before opening"` -> 22 passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/sandbox/ssh.ts src/agents/sandbox/ssh.test.ts src/agents/sandbox/ssh-backend.ts src/agents/sandbox.ts src/plugin-sdk/sandbox.ts extensions/openshell/src/backend.ts extensions/openshell/src/cli.ts extensions/openshell/src/openshell-core.test.ts` -> passed
- `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` -> passed
- `git diff --check` -> passed

## Local Test Note
The broader requested Windows run of `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/sandbox/ssh.test.ts extensions/openshell/src/openshell-core.test.ts` still fails on existing Windows-only assumptions unrelated to this patch: path slicing around `config` and symlink creation permissions. The new preflight-focused cases pass.
